title: Persona CLI commands (create, list, update, delete)
description: Implement the CLI commands for managing personas: smallhold persona create <username>, smallhold persona list, smallhold persona update <username>, smallhold persona delete <username>. Each persona is a row in the accounts table with its own RSA-2048 keypair (stored as PKCS8 PEM). Creating a persona generates the keypair in-process.
design: Generate RSA-2048 keypair with rsa crate (or rcgen). Store private key as PKCS8 PEM, public key as SPKI PEM. ap_id = https://{domain}/users/{username}. Actor URI embedded at creation time. Admin commands bypass the running server and talk to SQLite directly.
acceptance_criteria: smallhold persona create writer --display-name='My Name' inserts a valid row in accounts with RSA keypair; smallhold persona list prints all personas; created persona has valid RSA-2048 PKCS8 private key and SPKI public key; username uniqueness enforced at DB level
